text_body.plain_text: Sizing Methodology / SAM Build
Preliminary

runs.text: SAM Methodology | Award-derived work-type shares are applied to the outsourced TAM pool

text_body.plain_text: SAM Methodology | Award-derived work-type shares are applied to the outsourced TAM pool

runs.text: Evidence window FY2017–FY2026 FFATA/FSRS subawards. Award dollars set mix percentages only; they are not summed into market size. Outputs are average annual because spend is lumpy.

text_body.plain_text: Evidence window FY2017–FY2026 FFATA/FSRS subawards. Award dollars set mix percentages only; they are not summed into market size. Outputs are average annual because spend is lumpy.

runs.text: FFATA/FSRS subawards over FY2017–FY2026; award dollars set mix, not market size.

text_body.plain_text:
AWARD EVIDENCE PULL
FFATA/FSRS subawards over FY2017–FY2026; award dollars set mix, not market size.

runs.text: Parent-prime PIID maps program scope; retain physical component suppliers.
Wrong-scope records and non-component roles peel off before share math.

text_body.plain_text:
SCOPE AND ROLE GATES
Parent-prime PIID maps program scope; retain physical component suppliers.
Wrong-scope records and non-component roles peel off before share math.

runs.text: Registry/UEI first; known-vendor override; conservative NAICS-4 fallback; description as QA only; residual if unresolved.

text_body.plain_text:
CLASSIFY SUPPLIER DOLLARS
Registry/UEI first; known-vendor override; conservative NAICS-4 fallback; description as QA only; residual if unresolved.

runs.text: Structural/pre-outfit; machining/mechanical/propulsion; castings/forgings; piping/valves/pumps; electrical power/distribution/generation; HVAC/ventilation/chilled water; coatings/insulation/decking.

text_body.plain_text:
ASSIGN ONE WORK-TYPE HOME
Structural/pre-outfit; machining/mechanical/propulsion; castings/forgings; piping/valves/pumps; electrical power/distribution/generation; HVAC/ventilation/chilled water; coatings/insulation/decking.

runs.text: Work-type SAM = average annual outsourced supplier TAM × award-derived work-type share
Fed by share calculation and the fixed TAM input only.

text_body.plain_text:
APPLY SHARES TO FIXED TAM
Work-type SAM = average annual outsourced supplier TAM × award-derived work-type share
Fed by share calculation and the fixed TAM input only.

runs.text: Wrong ship, service, or appropriation; contaminant PIIDs; weapons/OPN/WPN; outside supplier boundary.

text_body.plain_text:
OUT-OF-SCOPE RECORDS
Wrong ship, service, or appropriation; contaminant PIIDs; weapons/OPN/WPN; outside supplier boundary.

runs.text: Prime and co-prime yard work; GFE/SIB/MIB; mission systems and combat electronics; services, IT, holding-company flow; foreign/FMS; other non-component roles.

text_body.plain_text:
EXCLUDED ROLES
Prime and co-prime yard work; GFE/SIB/MIB; mission systems and combat electronics; services, IT, holding-company flow; foreign/FMS; other non-component roles.

runs.text: Unassigned supplier dollars stay in the denominator, dilute named-bucket shares, and stay outside scenario SAM until evidence improves.

text_body.plain_text:
RESIDUAL / UNBUCKETED
Unassigned supplier dollars stay in the denominator, dilute named-bucket shares, and stay outside scenario SAM until evidence improves.

runs.text: Average annual outsourced supplier TAM from the TAM methodology. This is the dollar pool being sliced, and it feeds only the final bridge.

text_body.plain_text:
FIXED TAM INPUT
Average annual outsourced supplier TAM from the TAM methodology. This is the dollar pool being sliced, and it feeds only the final bridge.

runs.text: Scenario views: overlapping lenses, not additive.

text_body.plain_text: Scenario views: overlapping lenses, not additive.

BROAD
all seven physical buckets

HM&E
machining, piping/valves, power, HVAC

METAL
structural, machining, castings/forgings

ELECTRICAL
ship power only

MODULAR
entity flag, not bucket union

runs.text: Award records create the work-type percentages; the budget-derived TAM supplies the dollar base.
Subawards inherit program scope from the parent-prime PIID; stronger than keyword matching, but not hull-level work-order proof.
UEI and operating entity govern classification; NAICS-4 is fallback only; descriptions support QA and exceptions.
Electrical means ship power, distribution, and generation. VLS, radar, combat systems, and mission electronics are base-case exclusions or sensitivity only.
Residual supplier dollars remain visible and dilute shares, but are excluded from scenario SAM until evidence supports assignment.
No-recoverable-NAICS gaps, registry coverage, VLS and mission-systems treatment, modular entity flags, and bucket-share adjustments.

text_body.plain_text:
SAM method notes
Award data is not TAM: Award records create the work-type percentages; the budget-derived TAM supplies the dollar base.
PIID attribution: Subawards inherit program scope from the parent-prime PIID; stronger than keyword matching, but not hull-level work-order proof.
Registry first: UEI and operating entity govern classification; NAICS-4 is fallback only; descriptions support QA and exceptions.
Electrical boundary: Electrical means ship power, distribution, and generation. VLS, radar, combat systems, and mission electronics are base-case exclusions or sensitivity only.
Residual discipline: Residual supplier dollars remain visible and dilute shares, but are excluded from scenario SAM until evidence supports assignment.
Reliability flags: No-recoverable-NAICS gaps, registry coverage, VLS and mission-systems treatment, modular entity flags, and bucket-share adjustments.

runs.text: SAM slices the TAM dollar pool; it does not re-size the market. Award-derived shares, residual treatment, and scenario definitions move SAM allocation, while the fixed TAM headline stays unchanged.

text_body.plain_text: SAM guardrail: SAM slices the TAM dollar pool; it does not re-size the market. Award-derived shares, residual treatment, and scenario definitions move SAM allocation, while the fixed TAM headline stays unchanged.

runs.text: Sources: (1) FFATA/FSRS subaward records, FY2017–FY2026; (2) shared vendor and operating-entity registry, UEI evidence; (3) parent-prime PIID program-scope attribution
